name: Cheesy Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until tender when pierced with a fork, then peel and mash them.
2. Add salt, pepper, butter, baking powder, and cream to the mashed potatoes. Beat until well combined and butter is melted and fully absorbed.
3. In a saucepan, combine milk, cream cheese, and Old English cheese. Heat gently, stirring frequently, until the cheese melts.
4. Gradually add the heated cheese mixture to the mashed potatoes in batches, beating after each addition until all ingredients are incorporated and the potatoes are light and fluffy.
5. Stir in beaten egg yolks into the potatoes and mix well.
6. Beat the egg whites until they reach a stiff meringue consistency, then fold them into the potato mixture.
7. Pour the dish into an ovenproof casserole and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese. Place in a hot 450°F (230°C) oven for about 15 minutes, or until browned and beautifully golden.
NOTE: For added flavor, you can add 1 tablespoon of lemon juice to the egg whites just before folding them into the potatoes.
